SEARCH

Uses of Class
neqsim.process.corrosion.PipeSegmentIntegrity

Packages that use PipeSegmentIntegrity
Package
Description
neqsim.process.corrosion
 

  • Uses of PipeSegmentIntegrity in neqsim.process.corrosion

    Methods in neqsim.process.corrosion that return PipeSegmentIntegrity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.evaluate()
    Walks each segment, evaluating the CO2 corrosion rate and CaCO3 scale saturation, and records the worst segments.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.fromPipe(PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe)
    Extracts the temperature, pressure, mixture-velocity profile and diameter from a run PipeBeggsAndBrills so the integrity screening follows the same discretisation as the hydraulic model.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.setBrineChemistry(double caMgL, double hco3MgL, double so4MgL, double baMgL, double naMgL, double clMgL)
    Sets the shared brine chemistry used to evaluate the CaCO3 saturation index at each segment.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.setBrinePH(double pH)
    Sets the brine pH.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.setInhibitorEfficiency(double efficiency)
    Sets the chemical inhibitor efficiency applied uniformly along the line.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.setPipeAndGas(double diameterM, double co2MoleFraction)
    Sets the pipe internal diameter and gas CO2 mole fraction.
    PipeSegmentIntegrity
    PipeSegmentIntegrity.setProfile(double[] temperatureC, double[] pressureBara, double[] velocityMs)
    Sets the per-segment temperature, pressure and velocity profiles.
